# 🚀 ai-ready-docs AI-Ready Map

This is the L1 Discovery Layer. It provides a high-level map of all available documentation to allow LLMs to prioritize their context window.

## 📌 Core Specification (Must Read)
- [AIRD Specification v1.1](AIRD_SPEC.md) - The definitive standard for AI-Ready Documentation.
- [Adoption Guide](ADOPT.md) - How to make your project AIRD-compliant.

## 🤖 Model Ability Specs (Capability Matrix)
- [GPT-5.5 Specs (ZH)](gpt-5-5-zh.md)
- [Claude Opus 4.8 Specs (ZH)](claude-opus-4-8-zh.md)
- [Claude Opus 4.8 Specs (EN)](claude-opus-4-8.md)
- [Gemini Omni Flash Specs (ZH)](gemini-omni-flash-zh.md)
- [Gemini 3.5 Flash Specs (ZH)](gemini-3-5-flash-zh.md)
- [Cosmos-Predict 2.5 Specs (ZH)](world-model-cosmos-2-5-zh.md)
